name: Parakeet TDT 0.6b-v3 — Streaming Biased on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip predictions from Parakeet TDT 0.6b-v3 with production NeMo GPU-PB boosting under 32 kB PCM streaming simulation on all 93 gold-92 clips.

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions under streaming simulation. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds, num_chunks, audio_duration_seconds.
